_comment: EDIT THIS FILE to change what appears on /careers/. Set active:false to hide a role without deleting it. Then run ./deploy.sh

openings.title: Registered Nurse (RN)
openings.summary: Home Health and Hospice case management. Flexible schedule, local territory.

openings.title: Licensed Vocational Nurse (LVN)
openings.summary: Skilled visits, wound care and medication management in patients' homes.

openings.title: Physical Therapist (PT)
openings.summary: Home-based rehab. Our PTs hold master's and doctorate degrees.

openings.title: Occupational Therapist (OT)
openings.summary: Restore independence in daily living, with home-safety evaluations.

openings.title: Speech Language Pathologist (SLP)
openings.summary: Swallowing and speech evaluation and treatment, per-diem across the region.

openings.title: Home Health Aide (HHA) / Caregiver
openings.summary: Personal care and companionship, from a few hours a day to 24-hour care.

openings.title: Medical Social Worker (MSW)
openings.summary: Counselling, planning and community resource navigation for patients and families.
